rationale: Baseline was flat under the 600s cap, so I shifted the default regime toward more optimizer updates per wallclock second: shorter context, a smaller model, and MQA to cut attention cost. I paired that with a slightly longer wallclock warmdown and a faster Muon backend so the cheaper run can spend more of its extra step budget on actual learning rather than overhead.
title: Speed-biased smaller-context MQA transformer
